visibleListings.title: 5 Bedrooms Duplex With Boys Quarters " Near Completion''
visibleListings.description:
CURRENTLY SELLING! GROVE COURT, PARKVIEW ESTATE, IKOYI, LAGOS

A near- completion residential development (approximately 90% completed). with finishing works ongoing. The detached duplex is an exquisitely designed all en- suite five-bedroom with a maid's quarters situated in a secured and serene gated private estate in the heart of Ikoyi, Lagos. This property is an eco-friendly, green development of contemporary style aimed at providing it's homeowners with a piece of class while ensuring an impressive return on investment. This premium residential development will be tastefully designed with topnotch finishing and particular attention to details, fine lines, and light filled spaces.

Some of the General Features include;
-	High grade sanitary finish with top quality floor & wall tiles
-	All rooms en-suite with fully fitted wardrobes
-	Fully fitted kitchen
-	Water treatment plant
-	Security fence
-	Pre-wired DSTV & concealed AC units in general floor spaces
-	POP ceiling 
-	Ample parking space
-	Shared swimming pool 
-	Gym building                                                            
                                                                You may be aware that Lagos was once the Nigerian government's capital, but did you know that between 1966 and 1991, Ikoyi served as the seat of the Federal Government of Nigeria?
                                                            
                                                                Awolowo Road is home to the majority of Ikoyi's shopping malls. A high street with upscale shops and boutiques, privately owned businesses, cyber cafes, and so on can be found here.
                                                            
                                                                If you ask anyone in Lagos State to name a popular estate, Parkview Estate or Osborne Foreshore Estate will undoubtedly come up. Apart from being peaceful, these estates also have excellent security and infrastructure.
                                                            
                                                                You can learn about Nigeria's history and meet and interact with knowledgeable artists and curators at the museum. The bullet-riddled car from Murtala Muhammed's assassination, ancient royal crowns, carved ivory, and sophisticated handcrafted artefacts from all over Nigeria are among the works on display at The National Museum, which is located on Onikan Road in Ikoyi.
                                                            
                                                                Ikoyi is one of the most popular nightlife areas in Lagos, with clubs and bars catering to a wide variety of tastes and lifestyles. At night, Awolowo Road in Ikoyi has some of the city's best-known nightclubs.
                                                            
                                                                Aside from the corporate world and leisure pursuits, Ikoyi is home to a number of prestigious and well-known primary and secondary schools. These schools have excellent infrastructure and ambiance, as well as a track record of academic success.
visibleListings.location: Michelle Okocha Crescent, Parkview Estate, Ikoyi, Lagos

                                                                Did you know Lekki was named after a Portuguese sailor named Mr. Lecqi? I bet you didn’t.
                                                            
                                                                Lekki has a wide range of shopping opportunities. Do you prefer to shop indoors or outdoors? Whatever you are, Lekki has you covered. With so many malls in the area, shopping in Lekki can be a lot of fun.
                                                            
                                                                Northern Foreshore Estate, one of the most expensive estates in Lekki, provides an adequate drainage system for its residents. It has been able to curtail the known flooding issues of Lekki environs. 
                                                            
                                                                Recreational centres...check! Beaches….check! Restaurants…. check! Lekki is unquestionably a one-stop shop for fun and entertainment.
                                                            
                                                                Ebony Lounge, Jesse Lounge, Club Mirage, Novato Night Club, and Elysium Night Club are all great places to hang out. You can also party at any of these beach clubs: Mood Beach Club, Wave Beach Club, and Moist Beach Club.
                                                            
                                                                Schooling in Lekki is definitely not basic. Lekki boasts of having some of the most expensive and best schools in Lagos. The thing about schools in Lekki is that they offer more than just conventional teaching.

Because of its proximity to popular destinations and attractions in Lagos, Ikate is a very interesting neighbourhood. It is also a popular destination for celebrities and businesses.
                                                            
                                                                Ikate has just the right number and variety of markets and malls to make your shopping experience as easy and enjoyable as possible. Lekki Arts and Crafts Market, Pearl Market, The Lennox Mall, Blenco African Market, Itedo Market, and Elegushi Modern Market are among the markets and malls to visit.
                                                            
                                                                There are numerous good estates in Ikate to choose from, all of which offer its residents a peaceful living environment. Brown State Lekki Estate, Abiola Court 6 Estate, Richmond Gate Estate, SpringVille Estate, Horizon Court Estate, Haven home, Spring Bay Estate, and Vintage Park Estate are just a few examples.
                                                            
                                                                Despite being primarily a residential neighbourhood, Ikate has a good number of recreational and entertainment options. Leisure sports park, Kos Lagos, Family affairs plaza, Bambooka, Komfort Wellness Place, Hungrybelly restaurant, Stories Lounge, and Upbeat bites are some of these locations.

visibleListings.title: Spacious Self Compound Terraced Duplex
visibleListings.description:
Agege is the location of the recently opened Babatunde Fashola Station. The station connects Lagos to Ogun and Oyo states, with plans to expand to more states in the future. Agege also has a 4,000-seat multi-purpose stadium where football is played.
                                                            
                                                                Justrite Supermarket is a one-stop shop for all of your household necessities. Food, herbs, shea butter, fabrics, beverages, and much more are available at low retail and wholesale prices. The Abattoir Meat Market is known for its low-cost cows, sheep, and cattle.
                                                            
                                                                Agege is a suburb of Lagos in Nigeria. It has some of the most prestigious residential developments in the country. There are estates that provide residents with the peace, security and/or class they seek. These include Sunshine Estate, New Dairy Farm Housing Estate, and LSDPC Medium Estate.
                                                            
                                                                Visit Agege Stadium, a multi-purpose stadium with secure parking, a basketball court, a lawn tennis court, and a gymnasium. Check out Ultra Revere Spa, iGleam Skinmeister & Spa, or Pearl Beauty Spa for your body relaxation.
                                                            
                                                                Lounge 95, Solochus Bar and Club and Club Royale are all great places to unwind in Agege. Drinks, suya, BBQ fish, and shawarma are all available on the menu at Lounge 95. The park is a pleasant place to spend time with friends and family during the weekdays.
                                                            
                                                                Rose Valley School is located on a large, secure, and scenic campus. They provide affordable and high-quality education in a variety of subjects. Atlas Schools, Barachel Schools, Al-Hikmat Schools, and Ifako International Secondary School are among them.

                                                                Who'd have guessed that Lekki Phase 1, one of Lagos' most luxurious neighbourhoods, was formerly a slum? 
                                                            
                                                                There are several types of shopping malls in Lekki Phase 1 if you want to go shopping.                                                                 Lekki Phase 1 is a prime location for luxury estates because it is a well-planned residential government scheme. There are a number of private estates within its walls. Almost all of them are gated to ensure the safety of their occupants.
                                                            
                                                                Due to Lekki's affluent residents, the area has a lot of social hotspots. Weekends are usually jam-packed with visitors from all over who want to unwind after a long week at work. If you're looking to have a great time in Lekki Phase 1, you're definitely covered. 
                                                            
                                                                Do you want to chill with the ‘Lekki Big Boys & Girls’? Then go nighttime exploring in Lekki Phase 1. Lagos is known as the city that never sleeps, and the residents of Lekki understand the assignment. They are always willing to show up at the local bars and clubs. 
                                                            
                                                                Aside from entertainment and recreation, Lekki Phase 1 provides quality education to its residents. It is home to some of Lagos State's most prestigious schools.
